name: checkglyphs
description: Deterministic 5x5 chromatic glyphs generated from Checks token data.
author: Marc0s

scripts.test: node --check src/checkglyphs.js && node scripts/repository-checks.mjs && node scripts/morphology-tests.mjs && node scripts/regression-tests.mjs && node scripts/historical-loader-smoke.mjs && node scripts/renderer-smoke.mjs && node scripts/verify-engine.mjs
